problem_statement: Implement isBalanced(source) in ts/brackets.ts. Return true when every bracket among (), [], {} and <> is matched and closed in proper LIFO order; all other characters are ignored. Quote-awareness twist: a double quote opens a string literal running to the next unescaped double quote, and everything inside it — brackets included — must be skipped; inside a literal a backslash escapes the following character. If a literal is still open when the input ends, return false. The empty string is balanced. Verify with bun test tests/ts/brackets.
